name: file_access_win_susp_credhist
raw_query: any where file.path:"*\\Microsoft\\Protect\\CREDHIST" and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\Windows\\system32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")) or process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\explorer.exe"))
